news_headlines.title: Six seniors, four transfers, 48 years in the making: How UCLA won its first NCAA title

I just saw a commercial for American Idol and I’m amazed people still watch that tired shit. Hey, look, the ugly guy can sing! So can the fat bitch! The redneck guy is going to Hollywood! Ryan Seacrest is 79 years old out there pretending he gives a flying fuck about any of it.
When you’re talking about the greatest defensive performances in football history, I gotta go with Charles Jefferson after Jeff Spicoli fucked up his car.
Sometimes I think we just value the wrong things as sports fans. Willie McGee hit 79 homers in 18 years and he was more fun and exciting than a clown car full of 30-homer steroid freaks.
I remember when adults smoked so fucking much they had to put ashtrays in car seats and we all thought it was perfectly normal.

You can add “three home run robberies in one game” to the list of MLB records that will never be broken. Imagine winning 1-0 because you stole three dongs and got the last one in the stands like you were Bugs fucking Bunny. Incredible.
